summary: Comprehensive testing of ClickFlow project management application completed successfully. All backend APIs (24/24) and frontend features tested with excellent results.

design_issues.issue: Missing accessibility descriptions for dialog components
design_issues.note: Console warnings about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Dashboard stats display (Total Tasks, Completed, Projects, Time Today)
Project navigation and view tabs (List, Board, Calendar)
Task creation with all fields (title, description, priority, due date, tags)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor accessibility warnings)
